title: Bull Power grants +2 to Atk, Hit, Speed, and AL while equipped

effect.value: ATK_BONUS ADD 2; HIT_BONUS ADD 2; SPD ADD 2; AL ADD 2

plan.title: Bull Power grants +2 to Atk, Hit, Speed, and AL while equipped
plan.summary: Attach Bull Power and verify the equipped creature receives the +2 stat package.

notes: Pre-place this equip Magic on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
